title: Es Znacht dehei
desc: Invited to dinner at a friend's home

sn.s: D'Sara het mich zum Znacht iiglade.
Sie wohnt mit ihrere Familie es Stück usserhalb.
sn.e: She lives with her family a bit outside town.

sn.s: Ich bringe Blueme für d'Muetter mit.
sn.e: I bring flowers for the mother.
"How sweet, thank you very much!" she says.

sn.s: D'Sara chochet öppis Typisches: es Fondue.
sn.e: Sara cooks something typical: a fondue.

sn.s: "Chan ich öppis hälfe?" frag ich höflich.
sn.e: "Can I help with anything?" I ask politely.

sn.s: "Nei nei, sitz nu ane," lacht ihri Muetter.
sn.e: "No no, just sit down," her mother laughs.

sn.s: Mir ässed zäme und trinked es Glas Wii.
sn.e: We eat together and drink a glass of wine.
"The fondue is really delicious," I say.

sn.s: D'Familie fragt mich viel und lost guet zue.
sn.e: The family asks me a lot and listens well.

sn.s: Ich fühl mich wohl, fascht wie dehei.
sn.e: I feel comfortable, almost like home.

sn.s: "Du bisch immer willkomme," seit de Vater.
Bi öpperem dehei iiglade z'sii isch öppis Bsundrigs.
sn.e: Being invited into someone's home is something special.

sn.s: So tüüf chunnt mer i nes Land ine.
sn.e: That's how deeply you get into a country.
